codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case16_large_file","OptimizePerformance":true,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case16_large_file/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"comma","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(ID), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_ID), '') AS TRANSACTION_ID, NULLIF(TRIM(ACCOUNT_ID), '') AS ACCOUNT_ID, TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS TRANSACTION_DATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(AMOUNT), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS AMOUNT, NULLIF(TRIM(CURRENCY), '') AS CURRENCY, NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_TYPE), '') AS TRANSACTION_TYPE, NULLIF(TRIM(STATUS), '') AS STATUS, NULLIF(TRIM(MERCHANT_NAME), '') AS MERCHANT_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(CATEGORY), '') AS CATEGORY, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case16_large_file","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case16_large_file/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
